title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarks mixed-provider code generation workflows by systematically varying which AI model (Claude Opus or Kimi K2.6) handles planning versus implementation phases. The approach uses Archon to run the same workflow four ways across three real GitHub issues, then evaluates outputs on seven dimensions including correctness and code quality.
